choices.text: NFT-like assets on Bitcoin L1 via inscriptions: data embedded in Taproot witness; tied to specific sat via Ordinal theory. Released Jan 2023; no protocol change required. Stored permanently on-chain. Controversial in BTC community.

questions.explanation: Ordinals = NFTs on Bitcoin via inscriptions.

choices.text: BRC-20 (March 2023) via JSON inscriptions — speculative, off-chain indexer-based. Runes (April 2024) — UTXO-based, uses OP_RETURN, more efficient, designed to replace BRC-20. Stacks adds smart contracts as separate L2.

questions.explanation: BRC-20 + Runes for tokens; Stacks for smart contracts.
